new_items.summary: Radio Tamazuj reports escalating violence in Jonglei forced Save the Children to suspend operations and relocate staff from Akobo East after a military order for civilians/NGOs/UN to leave; the report cites 280,000+ displaced since December and warns of serious humanitarian implications.
new_items.why_new_vs_baseline: Baseline noted Jonglei crisis and Akobo evacuation order; this adds specific humanitarian service suspension details (Save the Children) and amplification of operational impacts.
new_items.notes: Relevance: potential grievance/victimhood narratives as aid halts; monitor for ethnic targeting / incitement linked to displacement.

new_items.summary: Radio Tamazuj reports clashes in Akobo town between SSPDF and SPLA-IO, civilians fleeing toward Ethiopia after an ultimatum, and UNMISS presence despite a withdrawal order.
new_items.why_new_vs_baseline: Baseline included evacuation order; this adds subsequent reported clashes and cross-border flight dynamics.
new_items.notes: Monitor for retaliatory rhetoric and ethnic framing tied to Akobo fighting and displacement.

new_items.summary: Radio Tamazuj reports Pigi County received 5,403 households (~32,418 people) displaced from Nyirol and Uror, with reported severe shortages of shelter, food, clothing, and health services.
new_items.why_new_vs_baseline: Baseline displacement figure was broader; this adds a localized displacement count and humanitarian needs framing.
new_items.notes: Potential grievance narratives; monitor if communities blame specific groups/forces.

no_signal.twitter_x: X/Twitter monitoring via search_social was not executed in this run because the connector/tool was not available in the current toolset.
web_sources: Somalia: no clear past-day Garowe Online Al-Shabaab items found beyond older Jan-Feb items in search results.
Kenya: no past-day Capital FM/NCIC hate-speech items surfaced in searches; top results were Feb 2026.
direct_fetch_limitations: EyeRadio and GaroweOnline headline pages did not yield clean headline+URL lists in fetch output, likely due to dynamic rendering or blocked content extraction.
